message.stormtotemmod.cooldown: Totem is depleted. Wait for it to recharge...
message.stormtotemmod.compass.thunder: ⚡ Thunderstorm is raging! Lightning may strike anywhere.

book.stormtotemmod.page1:
Welcome to Totem of the Storm!

This guide will teach you everything about harnessing the power of lightning.

Turn the page to begin.
book.stormtotemmod.page2:
Getting Started

First, mine Storm Ore underground (Y=-32 to 16).
Use a stone pickaxe or better.
You'll get Charged Copper Nuggets.
Smelt them in a furnace to get Charged Copper Ingots.
book.stormtotemmod.page3:
Crafting the Totem

You need:
- 2 Storm Infused Blocks
- 1 Storm Rod
- 1 Storm Flint

Place blocks on top of each other, rod on top. Right-click the rod with Storm Flint to activate!
book.stormtotemmod.page4:
Storm Wand

A ranged weapon that shoots lightning!
5 charges, 15 blocks range.
Craft with 2 Charged Copper Ingots + 1 Storm Dust.

You can also add 4 copper blocks around the totem for +50% radius!
book.stormtotemmod.page5:
Tips

- Use Storm Compass to check weather
- Totem has 5 min cooldown
- Enhanced totem gives bigger effects
- Good luck, storm chaser!

Thank you for playing!
book.stormtotemmod.title: Storm Totem Guide
